original_statement: who was the head coach of boldklubben frem for the longest amount of time?
mutated_statement: who was the head coach of a given club for the longest amount of time while being both exclusively interim and exclusively permanent at the same time?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Contradictory constraint addition: 'boldklubben frem' → 'a given club' (specific club→generic club) | adds requirement "while being both exclusively interim and exclusively permanent at the same time" (no such qualifier→mutually exclusive/illogical condition).

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的关键信息识别：代理在judge_thought明确写到“条件在逻辑上不成立/没有人符合该条件”并在chain thought中指出“该条件逻辑上不可能”且举例John 'Tune' Kristiansen只同时有临时和长期任期但不可能既“专属临时又专属永久”。代理没有尝试执行互斥要求或改写指令，而是基于表中数据与逻辑推理直接解释矛盾、得出“无人符合”结论。该行为属于通过事实与逻辑说明矛盾无法满足，从而合理化原始矛盾指令，符合“逻辑解释合理化”子类。
